reviews.reviewTitle: Comfortable, clean, and the service is friendly.
reviews.originalComment: Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Kamar bersih & nyaman,Pelayanan staf ramah dan cepat tanggap. Suasana tenang, cocok untuk istirahat. Secara keseluruhan, sangat direkomendasikan dan ingin menginap lagi di sini.
reviews.reviewComments: The experience of staying at this hotel was very satisfying. The room was clean and comfortable, the staff service was friendly and responsive. The atmosphere was calm, perfect for resting. Overall, highly recommended and I would like to stay here again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Strategic location..comfy and clean room.. good value for money
reviews.reviewNegatives: Many mosquitos in the night.. not sure if the property provides it, but I have my own repellent with me. Water was off in the morning, luckily they have tub in bathroom

reviews.originalComment: Dengan harga 80rb dapat penginapan yang sebagus ini, kamar wangi, staff ramah, meski kamar mandi diluar tapi kamar mandinya bersih banget
reviews.reviewComments: With a price of 80 thousand, you get accommodation as good as this, fragrant room, friendly staff, even though the bathroom is outside, it is very clean.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat nyaman dan bersih, lokasi dekat pantai dan strategis dengan tempat wisata lainnya, staff juga cukup ramah
reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable and clean place, located near the beach and strategically close to other tourist attractions, the staff is also quite friendly.

reviews.reviewTitle: The accommodation is very clean, strategically located near the beach, and the receptionist is very nice.
reviews.originalTitle: Penginapan sangat bersih, letak strategis dekat dgn pantai, resepsionis baik benar
reviews.originalComment: Rekomendasi penginapan utk daerah sumur iga
reviews.reviewComments: Accommodation recommendations for the Sumur Iga area.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bersih, lokasi dekat dengan tempat wisata sumur tiga. Staff meninggalkan nomor wa di mejanya, jadi gampang bila ada perlu sesuatu. Bakal nginap disini kembali, bila ke sabang lagi. Harga sesuai dengan aplikasi yg kita pesan secara online.
reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, located close to the Three Wells tourist spot. The staff left their WhatsApp number on the table, making it easy to reach out if we need anything. I would stay here again if I go to Sabang. The price is as per the app we booked online.

reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, located close to the Three Wells tourist spot. The staff left their WhatsApp number on the table, making it easy to reach out if we need anything. I would stay here again if I go to Sabang. The price is as per the app we booked online.

reviews.originalComment: Rekomen yg mau nginap di sini. Minusnya agak jauh dari beberapa tempat wisata, tapi worth it juga kok.
reviews.reviewComments: I recommend staying here. The downside is that it's a bit far from some tourist attractions, but it's worth it anyway.

reviews.originalComment: Pondok simpang 3 harga ramah di kantong cocok untuk yang suka backpackeran tempat nya nyaman aman dan bersih fasilitas lumayan lengkap setelah seharian melancong terus istirahatnya di pondok simpang 3.
reviews.reviewComments: Pondok Simpang 3 is budget-friendly, suitable for backpackers, with a comfortable, safe, and clean environment. The facilities are fairly complete, making it a great place to rest after a day of traveling.

reviews.originalComment: Cocok untuk rombongan keluarga, staf ramah, baik, kamr besar, AC juga dingin. Cuma  kebetulan pas hujan disana, banyak yg bocor kamarnya, terutama dekat KM kan bahaya, semoga segera diperbaiki biar makin top markotop
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for family groups, friendly and good staff, large rooms, and the air conditioning is also cold. It's just that it happened to rain there, and many rooms have leaks, especially near the bathroom, which can be dangerous. I hope it gets fixed soon so it can be even better.

We stayed at Pondok for 9 nights and kept extending our stay because life on the island is so chill and enjoyable!
We liked the location because it’s really close to the city center, with many local restaurants nearby.
The room is okay—the bed is comfy, the facilities are basic but functional.
There’s AC, which works fine, though it doesn’t cool the room a lot.
If you need the receptionist, just text him on WhatsApp, as there’s usually no one around.
Free water is available.

I recommend this place!
Great place and nice owner and stuff. Only downside is toilet seat is too low and small and no water spray. But other than a great choice and hilghly recommended

reviews.reviewTitle: Worth for that price with AC
reviews.reviewComments: While the bigger hotel offer the economic room without the AC, this property more worth it with the price offer.. the only lacking is share toilet
Selesa. murah. berbaloi
Untuk tidur semalam sebelum berpetualang. Okelah
The place to stay we need for traveling
(+) Staffnya ramah
Recommended untuk lokasinya, dan pelayanan yang baik dan ramah
Recommended dengan tempat dan pelayanan yang ramah

My initial intention to book Freddie but no room available so I book 1 night with pondok simpang tiga....walking distance only. When you go out can only get reception to book thier becak or driver.. the price is higher than usual becak (that how I felt as I visited pulau weh 6 mth ago) , then we chartered this becak (Irvan) from pondok to sabang city 2 way for 50k, to iboih beach 150k..the terrible thing is we would like tonever grocery at sabang first before go in iboih, this becak driver promised with no additional cost later sent us straight to iboih said the same grocery can get at iboih..that was my biggest mistake by trusting him, we unable to get the same grocery we want at iboih, he then promised to help us buy later then never do it . Quite disappointing
top

Clean and a good price room. Coffee and tea provided for the first day. Free water refill. Polite staff. Responsive owner.  Very basic tho and the ensuite bathroom has no ventilation so it’s a lil stuffy and smells a little. Squatting toilet, cold showers.
